objective: Turn assistant-work candidate domains, agents, templates, and routes into an operational candidate lifecycle system without promoting them into accepted ION canon.
deliverables: active provisional candidate-domain operation protocol draft
scorecard schema and first scorecards for safe candidates
route compiler lifecycle-state gate for inactive or rejected candidates
promotion proposal for one safe template or domain after scorecard review
acceptance_gates: allowed and forbidden uses are explicit
scorecard records route accuracy, proof usefulness, drift, and user burden impact
validator or machine-checkable instances exist where applicable
Steward/human acceptance names exact accepted paths before any promotion
receipt names all touched paths and non-claims
non_claims: This packet does not accept candidate domains into ION canon.
This packet does not create an MCP tool-contract expansion.
This packet does not grant candidate specialist agents sovereign ION role identity.
This packet does not approve production, live execution, secrets, deployment, Git push, or arbitrary shell authority.
